steps.title: Find the line from the table
steps.content: Use two table points to find the slope and intercept. The table includes $(0,95)$ and $(1,105)$.

steps.title: Read the equation
steps.content: From $(0,95)$ to $(1,105)$, $y$ increases by $10$ when $x$ increases by $1$, so the slope is $10$. Since the table has $y=95$ when $x=0$, the intercept is $95$. The relationship is $y=10x+95$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is $y=10x+95$, so A is correct.
